title: Assigning allergens and additives to a product
workflow_title: Assigning allergens and additives to a product
source: support.dish.co official article (Assigning allergens and additives)

steps.caption: In the main menu of the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles, click the category Products.
Click the pencil icon next to the product.
In the menu that appears, click Product information.
Place a checkmark next to the relevant allergens for the product.
Do the same for the relevant additives, which are listed on the right.
Click Save to apply the changes.
It is also possible to use the Allergens tab on the Products overview, where you can check the relevant allergens next to each item directly.

Then go to General, then the sub-category General, and click Send to implement the changes. When a guest selects allergens on your QR order site, an icon of the relevant allergen is shown next to the product.
